stories.title: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 So Powerful the White House Ordered It Shut Down
stories.topic: The Trump administration forced Anthropic to pull Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after Amazon researchers found a jailbreak. National security officials intervened within days. Cybersecurity experts signed an open letter calling the ban counterproductive.

stories.title: Microsoft Copilot Cowork Shifts to Usage-Based Billing and May Tap DeepSeek
stories.topic: Microsoft is replacing flat-rate pricing for Copilot Cowork with usage-based billing due to high token consumption. Evaluating DeepSeek V4 as a cheaper model option within Copilot.

stories.title: Google DeepMind Releases DiffusionGemma: Text Generation 4x Faster
stories.topic: DiffusionGemma applies diffusion-based generation to text, producing output 4x faster than autoregressive models. Runs on local hardware. Released as open-weight model.

stories.title: Google DeepMind Warns About Millions of AI Agents Interacting Online
stories.topic: Google DeepMind funding research into dangers of mass multi-agent interaction at scale without human oversight. First major lab to publicly flag this as imminent safety challenge.

stories.title: Critical Copilot Vulnerability Allowed Hackers to Steal 2FA Codes
stories.topic: SearchLeak exploit in Microsoft Copilot let attackers steal two-factor authentication codes via prompt injection. Patched by Microsoft.

stories.title: Anthropic's Fable 5 So Powerful the White House Forced It Offline
stories.topic: Follow-up: White House ordered Anthropic to pull Fable 5 after Amazon found a jailbreak stripping safety filters. Multi-agency national security response. Cybersecurity researchers protested.

stories.title: Sakana AI's Fugu Orchestrates Multiple LLMs Into a Single System That Rivals the Best
stories.topic: Fugu dynamically routes tasks across multiple AI models to match Anthropic Fable/Mythos benchmarks. Eliminates single-provider dependence. Multi-model architecture approach.

stories.title: OpenAI's Codex Watches You Work Once and Repeats the Task Forever
stories.topic: Record and Replay feature lets users demonstrate a workflow once; Codex converts it into a reusable autonomous skill. Not yet available in UK/EU.

stories.title: Samsung Deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to All Employees
stories.topic: Samsung rolling out ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to all South Korea employees and global Device eXperience division. One of largest enterprise AI deployments announced.

stories.title: Critical Copilot Vulnerability Let Hackers Steal 2FA Codes from Users
stories.topic: SearchLeak exploit in Microsoft Copilot allowed attackers to steal 2FA codes via prompt injection through search-grounding feature. Patched.

stories.title: Fable 5 Returning, GPT-5.6 Restricted: Governments Are Now Gatekeeping the Most Powerful AI
stories.topic: The Trump administration is preparing to lift its ban on Anthropic's Fable 5 within days, while simultaneously asking OpenAI to slow-roll its new GPT-5.6 model to a select group of partners only. Two

stories.title: Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash Can Now Use Your Computer — Not Just Answer Questions About It
stories.topic: Google DeepMind has introduced <span class="ai-term" data-def="A capability that lets an AI take direct control of a computer — clicking buttons, typing into fields, opening files, and completing task

stories.title: A Cancer Patient Fed His Medical Data to Claude — and Got Insights His Doctors Hadn't Considered
stories.topic: Connor Christou, a founder diagnosed with cancer, loaded his blood results, scan data, wearable output, and journal entries into Claude and used it to navigate his treatment. The story is a vivid demo

stories.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Build Jalapeño: A Custom Chip That Could End Big Tech's Nvidia Dependence
stories.topic: OpenAI and Broadcom have unveiled Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built specifically for running large language models at scale. It joins a wave of custom silicon from Google, Apple, and SpaceX — and it si

stories.title: Anthropic Accuses Alibaba of Running the Largest AI Model Cloning Attack Ever Recorded
